title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAPAO IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE TO SANTA MONICA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7233 / 65 OG No. 8, 1819 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4998, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAPAO IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE TO SANTA MONICA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Sapao in the Province of Surigao del Norte is hereby changed to Santa Monica.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
